title: SectorLLM：在不到1500字节的x86汇编中实现Llama2推理
title_en: sectorllm: llama2 inference in < 1500 bytes of x86 assembly
summary: 该项目展示了如何在极小的x86汇编代码（<1500字节）中实现Llama2推理，体现了极致的代码压缩和底层优化技术。它直接涉及LLM推理的轻量化实现，对于理解模型部署在资源受限环境中的可能性具有参考价值。This project demonstrates implementing Llama2 inference in under 1500 bytes of x86 assembly, showcasing extreme code compression and low-level optimization. It directly relates to lightweight LLM inference, offering insights into deploying models in resource-constrained environments.
